narrative:
Clark Township has 1,315 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
